hero.title: Establish Your Authority.
hero.subtitle: Professional Credibility, Delivered in 7 Days.
hero.description: Your website is your digital first impression. We don't just build pages; we build lightning-fast gateways that validate your business from the first second of interaction.

comparison.title: The Performance Gap
comparison.subtitle: Speed isn't just a metric—it's a psychological trigger. A slow site kills trust.
comparison.insight: High-performing sites convert 3x more visitors into loyal leads.

item1.title: Static-Site Generation
item1.desc: Zero server-side lag. Your content is pre-rendered for instant delivery.

item2.title: Edge Distribution
item2.desc: Hosted on a global CDN, making your site fast from anywhere on Earth.

item3.title: Clean SEO Code
item3.desc: Semantic HTML and optimized metadata ensure Google loves your site from Day 1.

roadmap.title: From Zero to Hero in 7 Days

phase1.title: Know the benefit of having a website
phase1.description: Having a website for your brand is not just a digital accessory—it’s a powerful business asset. It attracts, informs, convinces, and converts. For your company, it can be the backbone of your marketing department—feeding your agents with leads, analytics, and client insights.
phase1.benefitDesc1: 24/7 presence: Customers can discover your brand anytime, anywhere. Global reach: Break geographical barriers. Search engine visibility: Organic traffic via Google.
phase1.benefitDesc2: Trust factor: Signals legitimacy. First impression: The first place potential clients check. Showcase expertise: Testimonials and portfolios build confidence.
phase1.benefitDesc3: Lead generation: Capture clients with forms. Analytics: Track behavior to refine strategy. Content hub: Position your brand as an authority.
phase1.benefitDesc4: Customer self-service: FAQs and booking. Integration: Connect CRM and social workflows. Scalability: Your website grows with your business.
phase1.benefitDesc5: E-commerce: Sell directly online. Persuasive design: Highlight solutions to convert visitors. Reduced costs: More reach than traditional ads.
phase1.benefitDesc6: In short, your website is your digital HQ: it attracts, informs, convinces, and converts visitors into loyal paying customers.

phase2.title: From Wishes to Reality
phase2.description: This is where your vision takes physical form. Tell us exactly what you've been dreaming of—the colors, the vibe, the specific features that will make your brand legendary.
phase2.inputPlaceholder: I want a minimalist aesthetic with high-performance animations and a dark theme...

phase3.title: Virtual Consultation
phase3.description: We dive deep into your vision through our interactive strategy funnel. This isn't just a meeting; it's a collaborative architectural session where we align your goals with the latest tech possibilities.

step1.question: What is your current digital status?

step2.question: What is your primary goal for this site?

step3.question: Final Step: Where should we send your roadmap?

success.title: Booking Confirmed!
success.message: We have booked your free call consultation. Our team will contact you soon to finalize your roadmap.

comparison.subtitle: Passive sites inform. Active identities convert. Don't just show up; close the deal.
comparison.insight: Integrated systems and smart UX double your customer retention.

item1.title: CMS Integration
item1.desc: Manage your content effortlessly. No code, just creativity.

item2.title: CRM & Booking

item3.title: Micro-Interactions

phase1.benefitDesc2: Knowing exactly who we are talking to and what they desire.
phase1.benefitDesc3: Designing the shortest path between curiosity and payment.

phase2.title: Building the Engine

phase3.title: Stress Testing the Identity
phase3.description: Before the world sees it, we break it. We test every form, every button, and every automation to ensure your brand's reputation is ironclad.

phase1.title: Identifying the Bottlenecks
phase1.description: We map every repetitive task in your organization. If it can be described, it can be automated. We find the high-impact zones where AI can save the most time.

phase1.benefitDesc2: Exactly how many hours and dollars you'll save per month.

hero.title: Migrate to the Future.
hero.subtitle: Zero Downtime. Maximum Performance. Lower Costs.
hero.description: Escape the gravity of legacy systems. We migrate your business to modern cloud-native architectures that are faster, cheaper, and ready to scale.

comparison.title: The Modernization Gap
comparison.subtitle: Legacy bloat vs. Edge performance. Stop paying for inefficiency.
comparison.insight: Modernizing your stack reduces technical debt and infrastructure costs by up to 80%.

item1.title: Headless Architecture
item1.desc: Decouple your content from your code for ultimate flexibility and speed.

item2.title: Serverless Deployment
item2.desc: Only pay for what you use. Scale to millions of users without managing servers.

item3.title: Zero-Downtime Migration
item3.desc: We move your data and traffic seamlessly while your business keeps running.

phase1.title: Exposing the Inefficiencies
phase1.description: We perform a deep-dive audit of your current hosting, database, and code quality. We identify the 'bottleneck' services that are costing you the most money and speed.
phase1.benefitDesc1: Mapping exactly where your infrastructure budget is being wasted.
phase1.benefitDesc2: Identifying the slow queries and legacy scripts killing your UX.
phase1.benefitDesc3: Exposing vulnerabilities in your outdated plugins and frameworks.

phase2.title: The Parallel Universe
phase2.description: We build your new modern site in a 'shadow' environment. Your live site stays untouched while we refine the new performance-first version with all your existing data.
phase2.inputLabel: What is your current tech stack?

phase3.title: The Great Escape
phase3.description: Once the shadow build is verified, we flip the switch. Using advanced DNS strategies, we migrate your traffic to the new stack with zero interruption to your customers.

step1.question: Why do you want to migrate?
step1.option1: Site is too slow / Bad UX

step2.question: How much traffic do you handle?

step3.question: Where should we send your Migration Audit?

faq.title: Your questions, answered clearly
faq.description: Everything you need to know about our web creation tiers, services, and process — so you can make the right choice with confidence.

questions.question: What's the difference between Presence, Identity, and Dominance?
questions.answer: Presence is your professional launchpad — fast, clean, and credible. Identity adds interactivity, integrations, and conversion tools. Dominance is the full ecosystem: 3D elements, AI personalization, custom architecture, and automation. Each tier builds on the last.

questions.question: Can I start with Presence and upgrade later?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Every project is built to scale. You can start with Presence and move to Identity or Dominance whenever you're ready — no data loss, no rebuilding from scratch.

questions.question: How long does each tier take to deliver?
questions.answer: Presence launches in days. Identity typically takes 2–4 weeks. Dominance is a full custom build, usually 6–10 weeks depending on scope. We keep you informed at every stage.

questions.question: What makes The Next Level Tech Company different?
questions.answer: We combine AI-powered tools with human creativity. Every project gets custom design, strategic thinking, and ongoing support — not a template. We build for growth, not just launch.
